title: Wandering Merchant
body: A cloaked figure blocks your path, pack heavy with wares. They eye your party appraisingly. 'Rare goods for rare folk,' they say. 'What'll it be?'

choices.label: Browse their wares (spend 20 gold)
choices.resultText: You find a charm of warding among their stock.

choices.label: Ask for information instead
choices.resultText: The merchant points out a nearby landmark. 'Watch yourself out there.'

choices.label: Send them on their way
choices.resultText: They shrug and disappear down the path.

title: Abandoned Campsite
body: You find the remnants of a campsite — ashes still warm, bedrolls scattered. Whoever was here left in a hurry. A pack lies open near the fire pit.

choices.label: Search the pack carefully
choices.resultText: You find coin and dried rations.

choices.label: Rest here briefly
choices.resultText: The embers warm your hands. You take a moment to recover.

choices.label: Move on — this doesn't feel right
choices.resultText: Smart. You hear distant movement minutes later.

title: Fork in the Road
body: The path splits. A weathered signpost points two directions — one toward sounds of distant conflict, one into deeper wilderness. A third path looks recently cleared.

choices.label: Toward the conflict — danger means opportunity
choices.resultText: You find the aftermath of a skirmish. Among the fallen, scattered coin.

choices.label: Into the wilderness
choices.resultText: The deep path is hard going, but you find an untouched cache.

choices.label: The cleared path
choices.resultText: It leads to a small sheltered hollow. A good place to rest.

title: Lost Traveler
body: A figure stumbles toward you, half-delirious from exposure. They clutch a sealed letter and beg you to deliver it. They seem too weak to make it themselves.

choices.label: Take the letter and the time to help them
choices.resultText: You guide them to safer ground. They press a small token of thanks into your hand.

choices.label: Take only the letter — they'll have to fend for themselves
choices.resultText: They watch you go without a word. The letter is heavier than it looked.

choices.label: Refuse and continue on
choices.resultText: They stagger off into the wilderness. You don't look back.
